input.prompt:
Trace the exact function call chain Hugo uses to turn a single Markdown content file into rendered HTML during a build. Start from where the build pipeline initiates page loading, through content file reading, front matter parsing, Markdown-to-HTML conversion, and template rendering. I need every function name, its file path, and what it hands off to next.

Key packages to explore:
- hugolib/ — build engine, HugoSites, Site
- resources/page — Page interface and types
- markup/goldmark — Markdown converter
- markup/ — content format converters

Specific things to find:
1. What function in hugolib/ initiates the content build and reads .md files from disk?
2. How does a raw file become a Page object? What constructor/factory functions are called?
3. Where is front matter parsed out from the Markdown body?
4. Where does the actual Markdown-to-HTML conversion happen — which function in markup/goldmark/ converts the content?
5. How does the converted HTML get stored on the Page, and how does it get rendered into the final output file?

Search breadth: very thorough. Look at hugolib/site_render.go, hugolib/page*.go, resources/page/, markup/goldmark/convert.go or similar, and any content reading/processing pipeline files. Also check hugolib/content_map*.go and hugolib/site_content_map.go if they exist.

186			opts := []extension.FootnoteOption{}
187			opts = append(opts, extension.WithFootnoteBacklinkHTML(cfg.Extensions.Footnote.BacklinkHTML))
188			if cfg.Extensions.Footnote.EnableAutoIDPrefix {
189				opts = append(opts,

199		if cfg.Extensions.CJK.Enable {
200			opts := []extension.CJKOption{}
201			if cfg.Extensions.CJK.EastAsianLineBreaks {
202				if cfg.Extensions.CJK.EastAsianLineBreaksStyle == "css3draft" {
203					opts = append(opts, extension.WithEastAsianLineBreaks(extension.EastAsianLineBreaksCSS3Draft))

24	
25		xml "github.com/clbanning/mxj/v2"
26	)

28	const (
29		yamlDelimLf = "---\n"
30		tomlDelimLf = "+++\n"
31	)
32	
33	func InterfaceToConfig(in any, format metadecoders.Format, w io.Writer) error {
34		if in == nil {
35			return errors.New("input was nil")
36		}
37	
38		switch format {
39		case metadecoders.YAML:
40			b, err := metadecoders.MarshalYAML(in)
41			if err != nil {
42				return err
43			}
44	
45			_, err = w.Write(b)
46			return err
47	
48		case metadecoders.TOML:
49			enc := toml.NewEncoder(w)
50			enc.SetIndentTables(true)
51			return enc.Encode(in)
52		case metadecoders.JSON:
53			b, err := json.MarshalIndent(in, "", "   ")
54			if err != nil {
55				return err
56			}
57	
58			_, err = w.Write(b)
59			if err != nil {
60				return err
61			}
62	
63			_, err = w.Write([]byte{'\n'})
64			return err
65		case metadecoders.XML:
66			b, err := xml.AnyXmlIndent(in, "", "\t", "root")
67			if err != nil {
68				return err
69			}
70	
71			_, err = w.Write(b)
72			return err
73		default:
74			return errors.New("unsupported Format provided")
75		}
76	}
77	
78	func InterfaceToFrontMatter(in any, format metadecoders.Format, w io.Writer) error {
79		if in == nil {
80			return errors.New("input was nil")
81		}
82	
83		switch format {
84		case metadecoders.YAML:
85			_, err := w.Write([]byte(yamlDelimLf))
86			if err != nil {
87				return err
88			}
89	
90			err = InterfaceToConfig(in, format, w)
91			if err != nil {
92				return err
93			}
94	
95			_, err = w.Write([]byte(yamlDelimLf))
96			return err
97	
98		case metadecoders.TOML:
99			_, err := w.Write([]byte(tomlDelimLf))
100			if err != nil {
101				return err
102			}
103	
104			err = InterfaceToConfig(in, format, w)
105			if err != nil {
106				return err
107			}
108	
109			_, err = w.Write([]byte(tomlDelimLf))
110			return err
111	
112		default:
113			return InterfaceToConfig(in, format, w)
114		}
115	}

241				StdOut:             cfg.StdOut,
242				StdErr:             cfg.StdErr,
243				StoreErrors:        conf.Watching(),

29	)
30	
31	// ProviderConfig configures a new Provider.
32	type ProviderConfig struct {
33		Conf      config.AllProvider // Project config
34		ContentFs afero.Fs
35		Logger    loggers.Logger
36		Exec      *hexec.Exec
37		highlight.Highlighter
38	}
39	
40	func (p ProviderConfig) MarkupConfig() markup_config.Config {
41		return p.Conf.GetConfigSection("markup").(markup_config.Config)
42	}
43	
44	// ProviderProvider creates converter providers.
45	type ProviderProvider interface {
46		New(cfg ProviderConfig) (Provider, error)
47	}
48	
49	// Provider creates converters.
50	type Provider interface {
51		New(ctx DocumentContext) (Converter, error)
52		Name() string
53	}
54	
55	// NewProvider creates a new Provider with the given name.
56	func NewProvider(name string, create func(ctx DocumentContext) (Converter, error)) Provider {
57		return newConverter{
58			name:   name,
59			create: create,
60		}
61	}
62	
63	type newConverter struct {
64		name   string
65		create func(ctx DocumentContext) (Converter, error)
66	}
67	
68	func (n newConverter) New(ctx DocumentContext) (Converter, error) {
69		return n.create(ctx)
70	}
71	
72	func (n newConverter) Name() string {
73		return n.name
74	}
75	
76	var NopConverter = new(nopConverter)
77	
78	type nopConverter int
79	
80	func (nopConverter) Convert(ctx RenderContext) (ResultRender, error) {
81		return &bytes.Buffer{}, nil
82	}
83	
84	func (nopConverter) Supports(feature identity.Identity) bool {
85		return false
86	}
87	
88	// Converter wraps the Convert method that converts some markup into
89	// another format, e.g. Markdown to HTML.
90	type Converter interface {
91		Convert(ctx RenderContext) (ResultRender, error)
92	}
93	
94	// ParseRenderer is an optional interface.
95	// The Goldmark converter implements this, and this allows us
96	// to extract the ToC without having to render the content.
97	type ParseRenderer interface {
98		Parse(RenderContext) (ResultParse, error)
99		Render(RenderContext, any) (ResultRender, error)
100	}
101	
102	// ResultRender represents the minimum returned from Convert and Render.
103	type ResultRender interface {
104		Bytes() []byte
105	}
106	
107	// ResultParse represents the minimum returned from Parse.
108	type ResultParse interface {
109		Doc() any
110		TableOfContents() *tableofcontents.Fragments
111	}
112	
113	// DocumentInfo holds additional information provided by some converters.
114	type DocumentInfo interface {
115		AnchorSuffix() string
116	}
117	
118	// TableOfContentsProvider provides the content as a ToC structure.
119	type TableOfContentsProvider interface {
120		TableOfContents() *tableofcontents.Fragments
121	}
122	
123	// AnchorNameSanitizer tells how a converter sanitizes anchor names.
124	type AnchorNameSanitizer interface {
125		SanitizeAnchorName(s string) string
126	}
127	
128	// Bytes holds a byte slice and implements the Result interface.
129	type Bytes []byte
130	
131	// Bytes returns itself
132	func (b Bytes) Bytes() []byte {
133		return b
134	}
135	
136	// DocumentContext holds contextual information about the document to convert.
137	type DocumentContext struct {
138		Document       any              // May be nil. Usually a page.Page
139		DocumentLookup func(uint64) any // May be nil.
140		DocumentID     string
141		DocumentName   string
142		Filename       string
143	}
144	
145	// RenderContext holds contextual information about the content to render.
146	type RenderContext struct {
147		// Ctx is the context.Context for the current Page render.
148		Ctx context.Context
149	
150		// Src is the content to render.
151		Src []byte
152	
153		// SourceInfo holds optional information about the source of the content to render.
154		SourceInfo any
155	
156		// Whether to render TableOfContents.
157		RenderTOC bool
158	
159		// GerRenderer provides hook renderers on demand.
160		GetRenderer hooks.GetRendererFunc
161	}

283

285					Infof:    logger.InfoCommand("katex").Logf,
286					Warnf:    logger.WarnCommand("katex").Logf,
287				},
288				// WebP options.
289				warpc.Options{
290					CompilationCacheDir: compilationCacheDir,
291					PoolSize:            poolSizeWebP,
292					Memory:              imageWasmMemory,
293					Infof:               logger.InfoCommand("webp").Logf,

295				},

297				warpc.Options{
298					CompilationCacheDir: compilationCacheDir,
299					PoolSize:            poolSizeAvif,
300					Memory:              imageWasmMemory,
301					Infof:               logger.InfoCommand("avif").Logf,
302					Warnf:               logger.WarnCommand("avif").Logf,
303				},
304			),
305		}

307		if err := firstSiteDeps.Init(); err != nil {
308			return nil, err
309		}

311		// Prevent leaking goroutines in tests.
312		if cfg.IsIntegrationTest && cfg.ChangesFromBuild != nil {
313			firstSiteDeps.BuildClosers.Add(types.CloserFunc(func() error {

324

453	
454		h, err = newHugoSites(cfg, firstSiteDeps, pageTrees, sitesVersionsRoles)
455		if err == nil && h == nil {
456			panic("hugo: newHugoSitesNew returned nil error and nil HugoSites")
457		}
458	
459		return h, err
460	}

462	func newHugoSites(
463		cfg deps.DepsCfg,
464		d *deps.Deps,
465		pageTrees *pageTrees,
466		sitesVersionsRoles [][][]*Site,
467	) (*HugoSites, error) {
468		first := make([]*Site, len(sitesVersionsRoles))
469		for i, v := range sitesVersionsRoles {
470			first[i] = v[0][0]
471		}
472	
473		sitesVersionsRolesMap := map[sitesmatrix.Vector]*Site{}
474		for _, v1 := range sitesVersionsRoles {
475			for _, v2 := range v1 {
476				for _, s := range v2 {
477					sitesVersionsRolesMap[s.siteVector] = s
478				}
479			}
480		}
481	
482		numWorkers := config.GetNumWorkerMultiplier()
483		numWorkersSite := min(numWorkers, len(sitesVersionsRolesMap))
484		workersSite := para.New(numWorkersSite)
485	
486		var sitesLanguages []*Site
487		for _, v := range sitesVersionsRoles {
488			sitesLanguages = append(sitesLanguages, v[0][0])
489		}
490	
491		h := &HugoSites{
492			Sites:                 first,
493			sitesVersionsRoles:    sitesVersionsRoles,
494			sitesVersionsRolesMap: sitesVersionsRolesMap,
495			sitesLanguages:        sitesLanguages,
496			Deps:                  first[0].Deps,
497			Configs:               cfg.Configs,
498			workersSite:           workersSite,
499			numWorkersSites:       numWorkers,
500			numWorkers:            numWorkers,
501			pageTrees:             pageTrees,
502			cachePages: dynacache.GetOrCreatePartition[string,
503				page.Pages](d.MemCache, "/pags/all",
504				dynacache.OptionsPartition{Weight: 10, ClearWhen: dynacache.ClearOnRebuild},
505			),
506			cacheContentSource:      dynacache.GetOrCreatePartition[uint64, *resources.StaleValue[[]byte]](d.MemCache, "/cont/src", dynacache.OptionsPartition{Weight: 70, ClearWhen: dynacache.ClearOnChange}),
507			translationKeyPages:     hmaps.NewSliceCache[page.Page](),
508			currentSite:             first[0],
509			skipRebuildForFilenames: make(map[string]bool),
510			init:                    &hugoSitesInit{},
511			progressReporter:        &progressReporter{},
512		}
513	
514		// Assemble dependencies to be used in hugo.Deps.
515		var dependencies []*hugo.Dependency
516		var depFromMod func(m modules.Module) *hugo.Dependency
517		depFromMod = func(m modules.Module) *hugo.Dependency {
518			dep := &hugo.Dependency{
519				Path:    m.Path(),
520				Version: m.Version(),
521				Time:    m.Time(),
522				Vendor:  m.Vendor(),
523			}
524	
525			// These are pointers, but this all came from JSON so there's no recursive navigation,
526			// so just create new values.
527			if m.Replace() != nil {
528				dep.Replace = depFromMod(m.Replace())
529			}
530			if m.Owner() != nil {
531				dep.Owner = depFromMod(m.Owner())
532			}
533			return dep
534		}
535		for _, m := range d.Paths.AllModules() {
536			dependencies = append(dependencies, depFromMod(m))
537		}
538	
539		// Create providers that avoid naming conflicts with HugoSites fields.
540		sp := hugoSitesSitesProvider{h: h}
541	
542		opts := page.HugoInfoOptions{
543			Conf:                      h.Configs.GetFirstLanguageConfig(),
544			HugoInfoHugoSitesProvider: sp,
545			Deps:                      dependencies,
546		}
547	
548		if bi := hugo.GetBuildInfo(); bi != nil {
549			opts.CommitHash = bi.Revision
550			opts.BuildDate = bi.RevisionTime
551			opts.GoVersion = bi.GoVersion
552		}
553	
554		if opts.BuildDate == "" {
555			opts.BuildDate = hugo.GetBuildDate()
556		}
557	
558		h.hugoInfo = page.NewHugoInfo(opts)
559	
560		var prototype *deps.Deps
561	
562		var i int
563		for _, v := range sitesVersionsRoles {
564			for _, r := range v {
565				for _, s := range r {
566					s.h = h
567					// The template store needs to be initialized after the h container is set on s.
568					if i == 0 {
569						templateStore, err := tplimpl.NewStore(
570							tplimpl.StoreOptions{
571								Fs:                     s.BaseFs.Layouts.Fs,
572								Log:                    s.Log,
573								Watching:               s.Conf.Watching(),
574								PathParser:             s.Conf.PathParser(),
575								Metrics:                d.Metrics,
576								OutputFormats:          s.conf.OutputFormats.Config,
577								MediaTypes:             s.conf.MediaTypes.Config,
578								DefaultOutputFormat:    s.conf.DefaultOutputFormat,
579								TaxonomySingularPlural: s.conf.Taxonomies,
580								RenderHooks:            s.conf.Markup.Goldmark.RenderHooks,
581							}, tplimpl.SiteOptions{
582								Site:          s,
583								TemplateFuncs: tplimplinit.CreateFuncMap(s.Deps),
584							})
585						if err != nil {
586							return nil, err
587						}
588						s.Deps.TemplateStore = templateStore
589					} else {
590						s.Deps.TemplateStore = prototype.TemplateStore.WithSiteOpts(
591							tplimpl.SiteOptions{
592								Site:          s,
593								TemplateFuncs: tplimplinit.CreateFuncMap(s.Deps),
594							})
595					}
596					if err := s.Deps.Compile(prototype); err != nil {
597						return nil, err
598					}
599					if i == 0 {
600						prototype = s.Deps
601					}
602	
603					i++
604				}
605			}
606		}
607	
608		h.fatalErrorHandler = &fatalErrorHandler{
609			h:     h,
610			donec: make(chan bool),
611		}
612	
613		h.init.data = hsync.OnceMoreFunc(func(ctx context.Context) error {
614			return h.loadData()
615		})
616	
617		h.init.gitInfo = hsync.OnceMoreFunc(func(ctx context.Context) error {
618			return h.loadGitInfo()
619		})
620	
621		return h, nil
622	}

864	func (s *Site) prepareInits() {
865		s.init = &siteInit{}
866	
867		s.init.prevNext = hsync.OnceMoreFunc(func(ctx context.Context) error {
868			regularPages := s.RegularPages()
869			if s.conf.Page.NextPrevSortOrder == "asc" {
870				regularPages = regularPages.Reverse()
871			}
872			for i, p := range regularPages {
873				np, ok := p.(nextPrevProvider)
874				if !ok {
875					continue
876				}
877	
878				pos := np.getNextPrev()
879				if pos == nil {
880					continue
881				}
882	
883				pos.nextPage = nil
884				pos.prevPage = nil
885	
886				if i > 0 {
887					pos.nextPage = regularPages[i-1]
888				}
889	
890				if i < len(regularPages)-1 {
891					pos.prevPage = regularPages[i+1]
892				}
893			}
894			return nil
895		})
896	
897		s.init.prevNextInSection = hsync.OnceMoreFunc(func(ctx context.Context) error {
898			setNextPrev := func(pas page.Pages) {
899				for i, p := range pas {
900					np, ok := p.(nextPrevInSectionProvider)
901					if !ok {
902						continue
903					}
904	
905					pos := np.getNextPrevInSection()
906					if pos == nil {
907						continue
908					}
909	
910					pos.nextPage = nil
911					pos.prevPage = nil
912	
913					if i > 0 {
914						pos.nextPage = pas[i-1]
915					}
916	
917					if i < len(pas)-1 {
918						pos.prevPage = pas[i+1]
919					}
920				}
921			}
922	
923			sections := s.pageMap.getPagesInSection(
924				pageMapQueryPagesInSection{
925					pageMapQueryPagesBelowPath: pageMapQueryPagesBelowPath{
926						Path:    "",
927						KeyPart: "sectionorhome",
928						Include: pagePredicates.KindSection.Or(pagePredicates.KindHome).BoolFunc(),
929					},
930					IncludeSelf: true,
931					Recursive:   true,
932				},
933			)
934	
935			for _, section := range sections {
936				ps := section.RegularPages()
937				if s.conf.Page.NextPrevInSectionSortOrder == "asc" {
938					ps = ps.Reverse()
939				}
940				setNextPrev(ps)
941			}
942	
943			return nil
944		})
945	
946		s.init.menus = hsync.OnceMoreValue(func(ctx context.Context) navigation.Menus {
947			m, err := s.assembleMenus()
948			if err != nil {
949				panic(err)
950			}
951			return m
952		})
953	
954		s.init.taxonomies = hsync.OnceMoreValue(func(ctx context.Context) page.TaxonomyList {
955			taxonomies, err := s.pageMap.CreateSiteTaxonomies(ctx)
956			if err != nil {
957				panic(err)
958			}
959			return taxonomies
960		})
961	}

968	func (s *Site) initRenderFormats() {
969		formatSet := make(map[string]bool)
970		formats := output.Formats{}
971	
972		w := &doctree.NodeShiftTreeWalker[contentNode]{
973			Tree: s.pageMap.treePages,
974			Handle: func(key string, n contentNode) (radix.WalkFlag, error) {
975				if p, ok := n.(*pageState); ok {
976					for _, f := range p.m.pageConfig.ConfiguredOutputFormats {
977						if !formatSet[f.Name] {
978							formats = append(formats, f)
979							formatSet[f.Name] = true
980						}
981					}
982				}
983				return radix.WalkContinue, nil
984			},
985		}
986	
987		if err := w.Walk(context.TODO()); err != nil {
988			panic(err)
989		}
990	
991		// Add the per kind configured output formats
992		for _, kind := range kinds.AllKindsInPages {
993			if siteFormats, found := s.conf.C.KindOutputFormats[kind]; found {
994				for _, f := range siteFormats {
995					if !formatSet[f.Name] {
996						formats = append(formats, f)
997						formatSet[f.Name] = true
998					}
999				}
1000			}
1001		}
1002	
1003		sort.Sort(formats)
1004		s.renderFormats = formats
1005	}

1026		errorLogger logg.LevelLogger
1027		notFoundURL string

1030	func newSiteRefLinker(s *Site) siteRefLinker {
1031		logger := s.Log.Error()
1032	
1033		notFoundURL := s.conf.RefLinksNotFoundURL
1034		errLevel := s.conf.RefLinksErrorLevel
1035		if strings.EqualFold(errLevel, "warning") {
1036			logger = s.Log.Warn()
1037		}
1038		return siteRefLinker{s: s, errorLogger: logger, notFoundURL: notFoundURL}

1040	
1041	func (s siteRefLinker) logNotFound(ref, what string, p page.Page, position text.Position) {
1042		if position.IsValid() {
1043			s.errorLogger.Logf("[%s] REF_NOT_FOUND: Ref %q: %s: %s", s.s.Lang(), ref, position.String(), what)
1044		} else if p == nil {
1045			s.errorLogger.Logf("[%s] REF_NOT_FOUND: Ref %q: %s", s.s.Lang(), ref, what)
1046		} else {
1047			s.errorLogger.Logf("[%s] REF_NOT_FOUND: Ref %q from page %q: %s", s.s.Lang(), ref, p.Path(), what)
1048		}
1049	}
1050	
1051	func (s *siteRefLinker) refLink(ref string, source any, relative bool, outputFormat string) (string, error) {
1052		p, err := unwrapPage(source)
1053		if err != nil {
1054			return "", err
1055		}
1056	
1057		var refURL *url.URL
1058	
1059		ref = filepath.ToSlash(ref)
1060	
1061		refURL, err = url.Parse(ref)
1062		if err != nil {
1063			return s.notFoundURL, err
1064		}
1065	
1066		var target page.Page
1067		var link string
1068	
1069		if refURL.Path != "" {
1070			var err error
1071			target, err = s.s.getPageRef(p, refURL.Path)
1072			var pos text.Position
1073			if err != nil || target == nil {
1074				if p, ok := source.(text.Positioner); ok {
1075					pos = p.Position()
1076				}
1077			}
1078	
1079			if err != nil {
1080				s.logNotFound(refURL.Path, err.Error(), p, pos)
1081				return s.notFoundURL, nil
1082			}
1083	
1084			if target == nil {
1085				s.logNotFound(refURL.Path, "page not found", p, pos)
1086				return s.notFoundURL, nil
1087			}
1088	
1089			var permalinker Permalinker = target
1090	
1091			if outputFormat != "" {
1092				o := target.OutputFormats().Get(outputFormat)
1093	
1094				if o.IsZero() {
1095					s.logNotFound(refURL.Path, fmt.Sprintf("output format %q", outputFormat), p, pos)
1096					return s.notFoundURL, nil
1097				}
1098				permalinker = o
1099			}
1100	
1101			if relative {
1102				link = permalinker.RelPermalink()
1103			} else {
1104				link = permalinker.Permalink()
1105			}
1106		}
1107	
1108		if refURL.Fragment != "" {
1109			_ = target
1110			link = link + "#" + refURL.Fragment
1111	
1112			if pctx, ok := target.(pageContext); ok {
1113				if refURL.Path != "" {
1114					if di, ok := pctx.getContentConverter().(converter.DocumentInfo); ok {
1115						link = link + di.AnchorSuffix()
1116					}
1117				}
1118			} else if pctx, ok := p.(pageContext); ok {

1193	func (h *HugoSites) fileEventsFilter(events []fsnotify.Event) []fsnotify.Event {
1194		seen := make(map[fsnotify.Event]bool)
1195	
1196		n := 0
1197		for _, ev := range events {
1198			// Avoid processing the same event twice.
1199			if seen[ev] {
1200				continue
1201			}
1202			seen[ev] = true
1203	
1204			if h.SourceSpec.IgnoreFile(ev.Name) {
1205				continue
1206			}
1207	
1208			if runtime.GOOS == "darwin" { // When a file system is HFS+, its filepath is in NFD form.
1209				ev.Name = norm.NFC.String(ev.Name)
1210			}
1211	
1212			events[n] = ev
1213			n++
1214		}
1215		events = events[:n]
1216	
1217		eventOrdinal := func(e fsnotify.Event) int {
1218			// Pull the structural changes to the top.
1219			if e.Op.Has(fsnotify.Create) {
1220				return 1
1221			}
1222			if e.Op.Has(fsnotify.Remove) {
1223				return 2
1224			}
1225			if e.Op.Has(fsnotify.Rename) {
1226				return 3
1227			}
1228			if e.Op.Has(fsnotify.Write) {
1229				return 4
1230			}
1231			return 5
1232		}
1233	
1234		sort.Slice(events, func(i, j int) bool {
1235			// First sort by event type.
1236			if eventOrdinal(events[i]) != eventOrdinal(events[j]) {
1237				return eventOrdinal(events[i]) < eventOrdinal(events[j])
1238			}
1239			// Then sort by name.
1240			return events[i].Name < events[j].Name
1241		})
1242	
1243		return events
1244	}
1245	
1246	type fileEventInfo struct {
1247		fsnotify.Event
1248		fi           os.FileInfo
1249		added        bool
1250		removed      bool
1251		isChangedDir bool
1252	}
1253	
1254	func (h *HugoSites) fileEventsApplyInfo(events []fsnotify.Event) []fileEventInfo {
1255		var infos []fileEventInfo
1256		for _, ev := range events {
1257			removed := false
1258			added := false
1259	
1260			if ev.Op&fsnotify.Remove == fsnotify.Remove {
1261				removed = true
1262			}
1263	
1264			fi, statErr := h.Fs.Source.Stat(ev.Name)
1265	
1266			// Some editors (Vim) sometimes issue only a Rename operation when writing an existing file
1267			// Sometimes a rename operation means that file has been renamed other times it means
1268			// it's been updated.
1269			if ev.Op.Has(fsnotify.Rename) {
1270				// If the file is still on disk, it's only been updated, if it's not, it's been moved
1271				if statErr != nil {
1272					removed = true
1273				}
1274			}
1275			if ev.Op.Has(fsnotify.Create) {
1276				added = true
1277			}
1278	
1279			isChangedDir := statErr == nil && fi.IsDir()
1280	
1281			infos = append(infos, fileEventInfo{
1282				Event:        ev,
1283				fi:           fi,
1284				added:        added,
1285				removed:      removed,
1286				isChangedDir: isChangedDir,
1287			})
1288		}
1289	
1290		n := 0
1291	
1292		for _, ev := range infos {
1293			// Remove any directories that's also represented by a file.
1294			keep := true
1295			if ev.isChangedDir {
1296				for _, ev2 := range infos {
1297					if ev2.fi != nil && !ev2.fi.IsDir() && filepath.Dir(ev2.Name) == ev.Name {
1298						keep = false
1299						break
1300					}
1301				}
1302			}
1303			if keep {
1304				infos[n] = ev
1305				n++
1306			}
1307		}
1308		infos = infos[:n]
1309	
1310		return infos
1311	}

1314		seen := make(map[string]bool)
1315		n := 0

1320			seen[ev.Name] = true
1321			events[n] = ev

1327	func (h *HugoSites) fileEventsContentPaths(p []pathChange) []pathChange {
1328		var bundles []pathChange
1329		var dirs []pathChange
1330		var regular []pathChange
1331	
1332		var others []pathChange
1333		for _, p := range p {
1334			if p.isDir {
1335				dirs = append(dirs, p)
1336			} else {
1337				others = append(others, p)
1338			}
1339		}
1340	
1341		// Remove all files below dir.
1342		if len(dirs) > 0 {
1343			n := 0
1344			for _, o := range others {
1345				keep := true
1346				for _, d := range dirs {
1347					if strings.HasPrefix(o.p.Path(), d.p.Path()+"/") {
1348						keep = false
1349						break
1350					}
1351				}
1352				if keep {
1353					others[n] = o
1354					n++
1355				}
1356			}
1357			others = others[:n]
1358		}
1359	
1360		for _, p := range others {
1361			if p.p.IsBundle() {
1362				bundles = append(bundles, p)
1363			} else {
1364				regular = append(regular, p)
1365			}
1366		}
1367	
1368		// Remove any files below leaf bundles.
1369		// Remove any files in the same folder as branch bundles.
1370		var keepers []pathChange
1371	
1372		for _, o := range regular {
1373			keep := true
1374			for _, b := range bundles {
1375				prefix := b.p.Base() + "/"
1376				if b.p.IsLeafBundle() && strings.HasPrefix(o.p.Path(), prefix) {
1377					keep = false
1378					break
1379				} else if b.p.IsBranchBundle() && o.p.Dir() == b.p.Dir() {
1380					keep = false
1381					break
1382				}
1383			}
1384	
1385			if keep {
1386				keepers = append(keepers, o)
1387			}
1388		}
1389	
1390		keepers = append(dirs, keepers...)
1391		keepers = append(bundles, keepers...)
1392	
1393		return keepers
1394	}

1423	func (s *Site) assembleMenus() (navigation.Menus, error) {
1424		menus := make(navigation.Menus)
1425	
1426		type twoD struct {
1427			MenuName, EntryName string
1428		}
1429		flat := map[twoD]*navigation.MenuEntry{}
1430		children := map[twoD]navigation.Menu{}
1431	
1432		// add menu entries from config to flat hash
1433		for name, menu := range s.conf.Menus.Config {
1434			for _, x := range menu {
1435				// Shallow copy the menu entry, so we can set the URL and page without modifying the config.
1436				c := *x
1437				me := &c
1438	
1439				if me.PageRef != "" {
1440					// Try to resolve the page.
1441					me.Page, _ = s.getPage(nil, me.PageRef)
1442				}
1443	
1444				// If page is still nill, we must make sure that we have a URL that considers baseURL etc.
1445				if types.IsNil(me.Page) {
1446					me.ConfiguredURL = s.createNodeMenuEntryURL(me.MenuConfig.URL)
1447				} else {
1448					navigation.SetPageValues(me, me.Page)
1449				}
1450	
1451				flat[twoD{name, me.KeyName()}] = me
1452			}
1453		}
1454	
1455		sectionPagesMenu := s.conf.SectionPagesMenu
1456	
1457		if sectionPagesMenu != "" {
1458			if err := s.pageMap.forEachPage(pagePredicates.ShouldListGlobal, func(p *pageState) (bool, error) {
1459				if p.Kind() != kinds.KindSection || !p.m.shouldBeCheckedForMenuDefinitions() {
1460					return false, nil
1461				}
1462	
1463				// The section pages menus are attached to the top level section.
1464				id := p.Section()
1465				if id == "" {
1466					id = "/"
1467				}
1468	
1469				if _, ok := flat[twoD{sectionPagesMenu, id}]; ok {
1470					return false, nil
1471				}
1472				me := navigation.MenuEntry{
1473					MenuConfig: navigation.MenuConfig{
1474						Identifier: id,
1475						Name:       p.LinkTitle(),
1476						Weight:     p.Weight(),
1477					},
1478					Page: p,
1479				}
1480	
1481				navigation.SetPageValues(&me, p)
1482				flat[twoD{sectionPagesMenu, me.KeyName()}] = &me
1483				return false, nil
1484			}); err != nil {
1485				return nil, err
1486			}
1487		}
1488	
1489		// Add menu entries provided by pages
1490		if err := s.pageMap.forEachPage(pagePredicates.ShouldListGlobal, func(p *pageState) (bool, error) {
1491			for name, me := range p.pageMenus.menus() {
1492				if _, ok := flat[twoD{name, me.KeyName()}]; ok {
1493					err := p.wrapError(fmt.Errorf("duplicate menu entry with identifier %q in menu %q", me.KeyName(), name))
1494					s.Log.Warnln(err)
1495					continue
1496				}
1497				flat[twoD{name, me.KeyName()}] = me
1498			}
1499			return false, nil
1500		}); err != nil {
1501			return nil, err
1502		}
1503	
1504		// Create Children Menus First
1505		for _, e := range flat {
1506			if e.Parent != "" {
1507				children[twoD{e.Menu, e.Parent}] = children[twoD{e.Menu, e.Parent}].Add(e)
1508			}
1509		}
1510	
1511		// Placing Children in Parents (in flat)
1512		for p, childmenu := range children {
1513			_, ok := flat[twoD{p.MenuName, p.EntryName}]
1514			if !ok {
1515				// if parent does not exist, create one without a URL
1516				flat[twoD{p.MenuName, p.EntryName}] = &navigation.MenuEntry{
1517					MenuConfig: navigation.MenuConfig{
1518						Name: p.EntryName,
1519					},
1520				}
1521			}
1522			flat[twoD{p.MenuName, p.EntryName}].Children = childmenu
1523		}
1524	
1525		// Assembling Top Level of Tree
1526		for menu, e := range flat {
1527			if e.Parent == "" {
1528				_, ok := menus[menu.MenuName]
1529				if !ok {
1530					menus[menu.MenuName] = navigation.Menu{}
1531				}
1532				menus[menu.MenuName] = menus[menu.MenuName].Add(e)
1533			}
1534		}
1535	
1536		return menus, nil
1537	}

1606	// GetPage looks up a page of a given type for the given ref.
1607	// In Hugo <= 0.44 you had to add Page Kind (section, home) etc. as the first
1608	// argument and then either a unix styled path (with or without a leading slash))
1609	// or path elements separated.
1610	// When we now remove the Kind from this API, we need to make the transition as painless
1611	// as possible for existing sites. Most sites will use {{ .Site.GetPage "section" "my/section" }},
1612	// i.e. 2 arguments, so we test for that.
1613	func (s *Site) GetPage(ref ...string) (page.Page, error) {
1614		s.CheckReady()
1615		p, err := s.getPageForRefs(ref...)
1616	
1617		if p == nil {
1618			// The nil struct has meaning in some situations, mostly to avoid breaking
1619			// existing sites doing $nilpage.IsDescendant($p), which will always return
1620			// false.
1621			p = page.NilPage
1622		}
1623	
1624		return p, err
1625	}

1647	func (s *Site) renderAndWritePage(statCounter *uint64, targetPath string, p *pageState, d any, templ *tplimpl.TemplInfo) error {
1648		s.h.onPageRender()
1649		renderBuffer := bp.GetBuffer()
1650		defer bp.PutBuffer(renderBuffer)
1651	
1652		of := p.outputFormat()
1653		p.incrRenderState()
1654	
1655		ctx := s.TemplateStore.PrepareTopLevelRenderCtx(context.Background(), p)
1656		ctx = tpl.Context.DependencyManagerScopedProvider.Set(ctx, p)
1657	
1658		if err := s.renderForTemplate(ctx, p.Kind(), of.Name, d, renderBuffer, templ); err != nil {
1659			return err
1660		}
1661	
1662		if renderBuffer.Len() == 0 {
1663			return nil
1664		}
1665	
1666		isHTML := of.IsHTML
1667		isRSS := of.Name == "rss"
1668	
1669		pd := publisher.Descriptor{
1670			Src:          renderBuffer,
1671			TargetPath:   targetPath,
1672			StatCounter:  statCounter,
1673			OutputFormat: p.outputFormat(),
1674		}
1675	
1676		if isRSS {
1677			// Always canonify URLs in RSS
1678			pd.AbsURLPath = s.absURLPath(targetPath)
1679		} else if isHTML {
1680			if s.conf.RelativeURLs || s.conf.CanonifyURLs {
1681				pd.AbsURLPath = s.absURLPath(targetPath)
1682			}
1683	
1684			if s.watching() && s.conf.Internal.Running && !s.conf.DisableLiveReload {
1685				pd.LiveReloadBaseURL = s.Conf.BaseURLLiveReload().URL()
1686			}
1687	
1688			// For performance reasons we only inject the Hugo generator tag on the home page.
1689			if p.IsHome() {
1690				pd.AddHugoGeneratorTag = !s.conf.DisableHugoGeneratorInject
1691			}
1692	
1693		}
1694	
1695		return s.publisher.Publish(pd)
1696	}
